message:
Add indicatif dependency for progress indicators

Add indicatif crate with tokio feature for displaying progress bars
and spinners during file transfer and compilation operations. This
will enable visual feedback for long-running operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -29,6 +29,7 @@ colored = "2"
 is-terminal = "0.4"
 terminal_size = "0.3"
 regex = "1"
+indicatif = { version = "0.17", features = ["tokio"] }
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 tempfile = "3"
